subcodes.first_line: Praise be to the Desired One, worthy and befitting is He Who hath aided thee to turn unto Him and draw nigh [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که آنجناب را موید فرمود بر اقبال و توجه
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @the Bayan, its laws and their abrogation, @the Bab; the Primal Point; station and claims of the Bab
